mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.author_id, n.author_name, n.created_at, n.views, n.is_required, n.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = n.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.boards n WHERE n.board_type = 'NOTICE' ORDER BY n.is_required DESC, n.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.boards (id, board_type, title, content, author_id, author_name, created_at, views, is_required, tags) VALUES (#{id}, 'NOTICE', #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{isRequired,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tags,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.boards SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.author_id, n.author_name, n.created_at, n.views, n.is_required, n.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = n.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.boards n WHERE n.board_type = 'NOTICE' AND n.is_required = 1 ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE vibe.boards SET is_required = #{isRequired} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.title, n.author_id, n.author_name, n.created_at, n.views, n.is_required, n.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = n.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.boards n WHERE n.board_type = 'NOTICE' AND n.author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC

SELECT n.id, n.title, n.author_id, n.author_name, n.created_at, n.views, n.is_required, n.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = n.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.boards n WHERE n.board_type = 'NOTICE' AND n.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY n.created_at DESC

SELECT n.id, n.title, n.author_id, n.author_name, n.created_at, n.views, n.is_required, n.tags, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vibe.board_comment c WHERE c.board_id = n.id AND (c.is_deleted = 0 OR c.is_deleted IS NULL)) AS comment_count FROM vibe.boards n WHERE n.board_type = 'NOTICE' AND ( n.tags = #{keyword} OR n.tags LIKE #{keyword} || ',%' OR n.tags LIKE '%,' || #{keyword} OR n.tags LIKE '%,' || #{keyword} || ',%') ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
